Thailand on ⁠Tuesday cancelled a long-standing agreement ⁠with Cambodia to work towards joint offshore ⁠energy exploration, Thailand’s prime minister said, defying calls from its neighbour to stay the course on the 25-year-old pact.

news.headline: America builds AI, China uses it. That gap may decide the future
news.summary: When it comes to artificial intelligence, the United States still dominates the headlines – and, by most conventional measures, the technology itself.
